name: Internal Admin
releaseChecks: admin permission, rejection behavior, audit events, exports, bulk operations, rollback, and disable paths are technically reviewed by Codex
project-bound evidence covers sensitive, destructive, and cross-role behavior
exact user consent is required only for a prepared production release, external recipient export, real-user or staff communication, provider action, or irreversible production-data effect

may: edit admin UI, admin workflows, permissions, tests, audit documentation, and operational safeguards inside the current governed task scope
derive and implement confirmation, audit, permission, export, rollback, and approval-flow behavior from project evidence
mustNot: delegate admin permission, audit, export, bulk-operation, migration, rollback, or test strategy choices to the user
export regulated data to an external recipient, communicate with real users or staff, perform a production release, or create an irreversible production-data effect without exact consent
